image:image.image:title: MODCON Agartha — Forest Farm Estate, Narsapur Hyderabad
image:image.image:caption: 25-acre permaculture farm estate curated by The Green Team. AQI 12, 40 min from Hyderabad Financial District.

image:image.image:title: Forest house at dusk — The Green Team
image:image.image:caption: Forest-adjacent living curated by The Green Team, Hyderabad
